name: Fried Eggs Shanghai-Style
recipeInstructions:
This recipe will introduce you to an inexpensive gourmet treat.
1. Flake crab meat into strands, removing any cartilage.
2. Mix with sherry.
3. Wash onions; remove roots and greens; finely mince white part.
4. Wash and pat dry lettuce leaves; arrange on round serving plate.
Cooking:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat egg whites.
2. When eggs begin to stiffen, slowly add milk.
3. When eggs are stiff, fold in crab, onions, salt, and cornstarch.
- Be careful as the mixture may break down into a frothy soup.
4. Stir-frying:
- Heat wok to medium hot.
- Add oil when heated.
- Carefully add egg mixture, folding and turning until firm.
- Remove to serving platter.
- Serve.
